title: thelypteris timorensis
intro: Thelypteris timorensis, also known as the Timor shield fern, is a species of fern native to Indonesia and Malaysia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris timorensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
